g.text: kgateway is the north-south entry point
agentgateway is the protocol-aware AI gateway
backend policy requestTimeout=300s applies to litellm-upstream
litellm -> optional external LM Studio when LMSTUDIO_ENABLED=true
litellm -> runtime overlay when RUNTIME=ollama or vllm
KServe is installed in the serving stack but is not in the default /v1 hot path
